description: High Temperature Nylon SCBA Nosecup is structural frame of the SCBA facepiece made from nylon 6,6.
short desc: High Temperature Nylon SCBA Nosecup is structural frame of the SCBA facepece.
source: Sampled from an NFPA 1981-2019 compliant SCBA facepiece.

measured property.test description: Initial-mass-normalized mass loss rate [1/s] was measured in the simultaneous thermal analyzer experiments at two heating rates: 10 K/min and 30 K/min.

derived property.test name: melting temperature and enthalpy of melting
